title: Festus Winter Horror
description: A snowy horror apocalypse survival modpack.
body:
Festus Winter Horror is a 1.20.1 Fabric-based modpack that throws you into a harsh, snow-covered post-apocalyptic world teeming with horrors, hostile environments, and immersive survival mechanics. Stranded in an eternal winter, you must scavenge, survive, and uncover the secrets buried beneath the ice — while avoiding the many things lurking in the cold, dark wilderness.

🧟‍♂️ Core Features
❄️ Endless Winter: The world is locked in a permanent blizzard. Snowstorms, freezing temperatures, and whiteout conditions shape your every decision.

🧛 Horrific Encounters: Cursed mobs, paranormal threats, and unknown creatures stalk the snowy biomes. Mods like The Man in the Fog, Graveyard, and Cave Dweller create a constant sense of dread.

🧬 Origins & Abilities: Choose a supernatural origin that gives you unique abilities—and weaknesses—to help or hinder your journey through the apocalypse.

🏚️ Abandoned World: Explore haunting ruins, decaying villages, overrun cities, and frozen wastelands. Mods like Abandoned & Ruined Structures, Hostile Worlds, and Haunted Buildings provide an immersive world full of environmental storytelling.

🔥 Survival Over Comfort: You’ll face harsh hunger mechanics, limited resources, frozen rivers, darkness, and cold exposure. Every campfire, shelter, and decision matters.

🎮 Performance-Optimized: Packed with FPS-boosting mods like Sodium, Starlight, LazyDFU, and EntityCulling for smooth gameplay, even with visual enhancements.

🧊 Immersive Visuals: Snowy shaders, creepy soundscapes, and thematic resource packs create a chilling, cinematic feel.

🛠️ Multiplayer-Ready: Designed for singleplayer survival or server play. Team up or turn on each other in a frozen fight for survival.

🌨️ Why Play Frozen Descent?
If you’ve ever wanted a true survival horror experience in Minecraft, this is it. This modpack blends the challenge of winter survival, the intensity of hostile horror mobs, and exploration into a deeply immersive experience. Every minute you stay alive feels earned. Whether you're hiding from things that move in the snow or scavenging abandoned towns in silence—this is survival, not comfort.

🔧 Recommended Settings
Fabric Loader 1.20.1

6–8GB RAM minimum

Use the included resource pack and shader profile for full immersion

Optional: Play with dynamic lighting off for a more terrifying night
